howItWorks.intro: This grow light coverage calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.

rules.name: Watts
rules.formula: Watts = Area × W/sqft × Light Type Efficiency
rules.explanation: Required wattage based on plant needs and light technology efficiency.

howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates based on standard formulas. Verify with current local data for your specific situation.

faq.q: How many watts per square foot?
faq.a: LED: 20-40W/sq ft depending on plant type. HPS needs 50% more wattage.

faq.q: How high should grow lights be?
faq.a: Typically 12-24 inches above plants for LED, 24-36 inches for HPS.
